creator: papowell@astart.com
text:
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-8-stable/print/
    ghostscript8-8.71_6.tbz

Does not have X11 support.  There is also a package
    ghostscript8-nox11-8.71_6.tbz

   

This is a companion package/module for XML::Compile

Fix: 

Recompile, copy version to packages-8-stable?
How-To-Repeat: 
laptop_81: {101} # pkg_add ghostscript8-8.71_6.tbz 
pkg_add: warning: package 'ghostscript8-8.71_6' requires 'tiff-4.0.0', but 'tiff-3.9.4' is installed
pkg_add: warning: package 'ghostscript8-8.71_6' requires 'pkg-config-0.25_1', but 'pkg-config-0.25' is installed
pkg_add: warning: package 'ghostscript8-8.71_6' requires 'libSM-1.1.1_3,1', but 'libSM-1.1.1_1,1' is installed
pkg_add: warning: package 'ghostscript8-8.71_6' requires 'libxcb-1.7', but 'libxcb-1.6' is installed
pkg_add: warning: package 'ghostscript8-8.71_6' requires 'libX11-1.3.3_1,1', but 'libX11-1.3.3,1' is installed

Note: in order to use the script dvipdf, dvips must be installed.
This program may be provided by either print/dvips or print/dvipsk-tetex
(print/dvipsk-tetex may be preferable since it doesn't conflict with
tetex things).

Also note that FAPIfontmap and FAPIcidfmap in
/usr/local/share/ghostscript/8.71/Resource/Init have to be configured first if
WITH_FT_BRIDGE is enabled.

laptop_81: {102} # gs --help
GPL Ghostscript 8.71 (2010-02-10)
Copyright (C) 2010 Artifex Software, Inc.  All rights reserved.
Usage: gs [switches] [file1.ps file2.ps ...]
Most frequently used switches: (you can use # in place of =)
 -dNOPAUSE           no pause after page   | -q       `quiet', fewer messages
 -g<width>x<height>  page size in pixels   | -r<res>  pixels/inch resolution
 -sDEVICE=<devname>  select device         | -dBATCH  exit after last file
 -sOutputFile=<file> select output file: - for stdout, |command for pipe,
                                         embed %d or %ld for page #

Please report bugs to bugs.ghostscript.com.

Note that x11 is not in the supproted devices
